statement: In every magma, Equation 2020 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * (z * y)`) implies Equation 3021 (`x = ((y * (z * z)) * w) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0037
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) (op z y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z z)) w) z)
